title: Zi Lib
description: Library mod for my mods.  Enhances UI development.
body:
# Zi-Lib
This mod does not affect the gameplay.

## 📝 Custom Component Text Formatting
Add dynamic text formatting. Use rich, nested components and inline control codes, similar to  [Denizen’s](https://denizenscript.com/) <tag> syntax for bold effects, colors, gradient, and more. 
```
"<&a,l>Hello World"
``` 
It will return Hello World with green color and bold text decoration.
## 🎞️ GUI Animation Utilities
Animate UI effortlessly with utilities for motion, easing, typing effects, fading, and more.

## 🛠️ Miscellaneous
- Custom Window Icon - change the Minecraft window icon to our logo
- Custom Window Title - set a window title for immersion. By default the title will match the instance/profile name. (only support Modrinth App & MultiMC)
- Discord Rich Presence (RPC) - integrate Minecraft with Discord to show custom activity states.

The misc features are configurable via Mod Menu.
